headline: Trump 🟠👨‍💼 'Winding Down' Iran War? 😂🚀 MORE BOOMS 💥🛳️ incoming!
text:
Trump 🟠🍊 Daddy-in-Chief 👨‍💼🇺🇸 straight-up TROLLING 😏📱 the fake news GOONS 🤡📰, yapping 'We're WINNING SO HARD 💪🔥 we might wind down this Iran SLAYFEST 💥🕌!' But hold my Diet Coke 🥤❄️ cuz White House SIMPS 🤤💰 just DROPPED a THICC $200BN WAR CHEST 💸🤑 request – that's MORE TROOPS 🪖💪 and WARSHIPS 🚢🛳️ BRRRR-ing to the Strait of Hormuz 🚪🌊 like it's a Black Friday sale at Bass Pro Shops! 🏪🎣

Energy PRICES 📈⛽ SKYROCKETING 50% 🚀💥 since Iran CHADS 🕌😤 'closed' the strait last month – gas pump PAIN 😩💸 hitting Joe Sixpack harder than a Biden nap! 🛌😴 Trump posts on Truth Social 📱🔥: 'No ceasefire bby 👶🚫 when we're OBLITERATING 👊💀 the Terrorist Mullahs!' But then flips to 'Very close to objectives, winding down our GREAT military BBQ 🔥🍖 in ME!' Classic 4D chess 🧩♟️ or just Orange Man tweeting from Mar-a-Lago golf cart ⛳🏖️?

Strait of Hormuz? 'Let NATO COWARDS 🐔😭 police it – US ain't yo' babysitter! 👶🚫' Trump ROASTS 🍗🔥 Euro simps for ghosting the 'simple' reopen op – 'So easy, zero risk, but y'all SOFT AF! We REMEMBER 👀📝!' Meanwhile, Pentagon BADASSES 🦅🪖 prepping GROUND INVASION 💥🏃‍♂️ into Iran, chatting how to GITMO Iranian POWs 🪝🔒 – plus 2,500 MARINES 🦅⚔️ and warships STEAMING IN 🛳️🌊 per Reuters scoop! 📰🔥

Axios SPILLS ☕💦: Trump crew eyeing KHARG ISLAND TAKEOVER 🏝️💣 – that oil terminal JUICY SPOT 💰🛢️ US already BOMBSHELL'd this month! White House bossman boasts 'We can YEET it anytime! 💥🗑️' Retired Col Cancian 💂‍♂️📈 says reinforcements take 1-30 days to THICCEN the herd 🐄➡️🐑 – 'Slow burn bros, but COMING HARD! 😤🍆'

Iran's new Supreme Leader MOJTABA KHAMENEI 🕌👑 (RIP Daddy Ayatollah 💀📜 from Israeli opener) drops Nowruz DEFY BOMB 💣🎉: 'We HIT enemy with DIZZYING BLOW 🌀👊 – now Trump's SPITTING NONSENSE 🤪💨!' Iran UNLOADS fresh DRONE SWARMS 🛸🚀 and MISSILES 💥 on Saudi 💰🏜️ and Israel 🇮🇱✡️ – unity OP making mullahs feel INVINCIBLE 🛡️😤!

Trump admin throws SANCTION WAIVER 🆓📜 for 140M barrels STRANDED OIL 🛢️⚓ to chill global ENERGY MELTDOWN 🌍🔥 – but pump prices BITING voters' wallets 😬💳 ahead of midterms! GOP bros sweating BULLETS 🩸😰 if war vibes tank their seats. Trump said war 'pretty much COMPLETE' on March 9 📅😏 to CBS, 'over QUICKLY' in Florida – but ESCALATION CITY 🚀📈! Is it wind-down or RAMP-UP ORGY 💦💥? Orange God Emperor says 'MISSION ACCOMPLISHED' 🏆😂 but sends MORE IRON 😤🛡️ – STAY TUNED for the PLOT TWIST! 🎭🍿
